CREATE TABLE test_array (keys Array(Int32), values Array(Int32));
SELECT mapPopulateSeries(keys, values, 5) AS result FROM test_array;
CREATE TABLE test_complex (id Int32, m Map(Int32, Int32));
INSERT INTO test_complex VALUES (1, map(1, 100, 2, 200)), (2, map(1, 150, 3, 250));
SELECT id, mapPopulateSeries(m, 5) FROM test_complex WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE test_nested AS SELECT mapPopulateSeries(map(1, 10, 4, 40), 4) AS nested_result;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT mapPopulateSeries(map(1, 100, 3, 300), 4) AS inner_map) AS outer_query;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, mapPopulateSeries(keys, values, 5) AS map_result FROM test_array) AS result_table;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id Int32, m Map(Int32, Int32));
INSERT INTO test_join VALUES (1, map(1, 50, 2, 100)), (2, map(2, 200, 3, 300));
SELECT id, mapPopulateSeries(m, 3) FROM test_join WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_join WHERE id = 1);
SELECT id, mapPopulateSeries(m, 10) FROM (SELECT id, m FROM test_join) AS subquery;
